ddls:
CREATE TABLE "microcontrollers" (
  "mcu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each microcontroller model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the microcontroller model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the microcontroller model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the microcontroller */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the microcontroller model was first produced */,
  "end_of_life_date" TEXT /* Date when the microcontroller model will no longer be produced */,
  "supported_os_versions" TEXT /* JSON array of supported operating system versions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mcu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registers" (
  "register_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register */,
  "mcu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microcontroller the register belongs to */,
  "register_name" TEXT /* Name of the register */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the register */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the register */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data stored in the register */,
  "size_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of the register in bytes */,
  "reset_value" TEXT /* Value of the register after a reset */,
  "volatile" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the register is volatile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registers_mcu_id FOREIGN KEY ("mcu_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mcu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration version */,
  "mcu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microcontroller the configuration belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was approved */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the version is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_versions_mcu_id FOREIGN KEY ("mcu_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mcu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration version the setting belongs to */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register the setting belongs to */,
  "bit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bit the setting belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the bit in the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the setting is the default value */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the setting is locked and cannot be changed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_settings_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_settings_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES configuration_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., hardware engineer, software developer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration version being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES configuration_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration version the change belongs to */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the setting */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the change */,
  "is_rollback" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the change was a rollback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES configuration_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES configuration_settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the register group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the register group */,
  "is_system_critical" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the group is critical for system operation */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Integer indicating the priority of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_group_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register group assignment */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_group_assignments_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_group_assignments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_group_assignments_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES register_groups ("group_id")
)
